title: 284a's Bracelet of Undying
description: Turns Totem of Undying to Bracelet of Undying! With animated textures!
body:
# About
**This resource pack changes the 3D model, texture and name of the Totem of Undying to Bracelet of Undying.**

<details>
<summary>Show image</summary>

![Bracelet of Undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49f38b2ab2899b6a87c8356021d45a4603d69160.png)

</details>



## With animated textures!

<details>
<summary>Show image</summary>

![Animated texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/55zu61wl/images/94e26e93c4c085a3a86b3c4a322f3b866cfc2528.gif)

</details>



## Invisible in 1st person camera to improve view

<details>
<summary>Show image</summary>

![Invisible in 1st person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/55zu61wl/images/46688606bdcbc15be9aca655418e084c450bd70d_350.webp)

</details>
